title: More than a meat- or synthetic nitrogen fertiliser-substitute: a review of legume phytochemicals as drivers of ‘One Health’ via their influence on the functional diversity of soil- and gut-microbes
description: A review of legume phytochemicals and their roles in driving the interconnected health of humans, animals, and soils through modulation of microbial functional diversity in soil and gut ecosystems. It examines how compounds such as phenolic compounds, saponins, and oligosaccharides influence plant–microbe symbiosis, soil fertility, and gut microbiome composition under the One Health framework.
